title: Guillque's Enhanced Enchanting
description: Vanilla-friendly custom texture for enchanted books
body:
# **Make your bookshelf fancier !**
 
**Guillque's Enhanced Enchanting** gives custom textures to enchanted books based on their enchantments.

 

The **buckle** changes material depending on the enchantment level:
- **Level 1**: Copper
- **Level 2**: Iron
- **Level 3**: Gold
- **Level 4**: Diamond
- **Level 5**: Netherite
- **Enchantments without levels**: Emerald
  
Enchantments from the same **category** share the same **cover color**, while the _ribbon_ changes for each specific enchantment.

Need a CIT mod to work, such as [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) or Optifine.
